title: Out of Egypt
overview: Follow a group of filmmakers as they attempt one of the proposed routes of the Exodus journey. Retrace the Isrealites' steps, as God led them out of slavery in Egypt, through the wilderness of Jordan, and to the Promised Land of Canaan. As they delve deep into the history, culture, and geography of the Exodus, they consider how God can take each of us on a journey from slavery to salvation.
